summary: Release Entry Record RER-TASKFLOW-001 passes all 5 hard gates — ORD confirmed frozen, release scope declared with enumerated type, named release owner with authorization level, and traceable authorization reference on record.

warnings.description: Release owner authorization level (senior engineer, up to 50%) is below the full 100% exposure target. Full exposure will require engineering manager escalation per the stated authorization level — confirm this is anticipated and planned in the Release Plan.
